english: Strike Opponent's Ears with Both Fists
visual: Bow stance with both fists swinging in wide upward arcs to meet at head height, as if striking an opponent's temples.
motion_description: The practitioner begins in a staggered stance with the right foot forward and hands positioned lightly near the hips. With continuous flow, the weight shifts completely onto the bending right leg to form a bow stance, keeping the torso upright and squared forward. Simultaneously, both arms sweep backward slightly, then trace wide, upward, and inward arcs as the hands close into fists. The fists converge at head height slightly in front of the face, and the motion concludes with a deliberate, steady pause.
